response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and mentorship capability, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. Their career has focused on web/full-stack development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js), with only 6 months of professional C++ experience in 2014-2015. The role requires 8-12 years of deep C++ expertise combined with industrial automation and embedded systems experience—neither of which is evident in their background. The absence of security standards (SDL, IEC 62443), industrial protocols, or IoT/manufacturing domain knowledge represents a substantial gap that would require significant ramp-up in unfamiliar territory.
strengths: Demonstrates software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, clean code) and mentoring experience through workshops and team leadership
Strong educational foundation with IIT Bombay degree and 15+ years of professional software development across diverse technologies
Proven ability to learn multiple programming languages and work across full-stack domains (backend, frontend, infrastructure)
concerns: Only 6 months of recent professional C++ experience (2014-2015); current focus is web/full-stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React), not systems programming
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT platforms, manufacturing systems, or embedded development required by the role
No evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle practices, IEC 62443 compliance, or industrial cybersecurity knowledge—core security requirements for the position

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and IoT domain experience
